overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through a neon-lit urban underpass and commercial corridor at night. The scene features cyberpunk aesthetics with glowing advertisements, vending machines, concrete architecture, and scattered pedestrians.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the dimly lit underpass beneath concrete beams

notable_agents.action: person in white shirt walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: yellow and teal building facade with illuminated PAWNSHOP signage
tall red vending machine with glowing product display
heavy concrete structural beams overhead creating a covered walkway
large external AC unit mounted on the pawn shop wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dimly lit concrete underpass with a pawn shop on the left and vending machines on the right. The camera moves forward beneath heavy concrete beams, passing scattered pedestrians walking through the narrow enclosed walkway.

agents.ego_description: continuing through the darker section of the underpass with graffiti-covered walls

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians standing and walking along the graffiti wall

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti and street art
scattered cardboard and debris along the right wall

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the underpass, the pawn shop gives way to graffiti-covered concrete walls on the right. The lighting remains dim and artificial, with scattered trash and moderate pedestrian activity visible along the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon commercial corridor with digital advertising

events.description: transitioning from dark underpass to brightly lit commercial zone with neon ceiling strips and digital billboards

agents.ego_description: walking through the vibrant commercial corridor surrounded by glowing advertisements

notable_agents.action: pedestrians walking ahead in the same direction through the corridor

entered.detail: large curved digital screen displaying CIRRUS advertisement with purple and red graphics
illuminated PARADISE signage mounted on the ceiling
linear orange neon lights running along the ceiling providing ambient illumination
cyan neon sign reading SOFTSYS on the left wall

segments.scene_description: The environment transforms into a high-tech commercial corridor with vibrant neon lighting. Large digital billboards including CIRRUS and SOFTSYS illuminate the left side while orange neon strips line the ceiling. The ground changes to paved tiles and the crowd density increases slightly.

scene_state.functional_zone: high-end retail walkway with illuminated entrance

events.description: approaching the brightly lit cyan and pink entrance at the end of the corridor

agents.ego_description: approaching and moving toward the glowing entrance of a building

notable_agents.action: pedestrian entering the illuminated cyan doorway ahead of the camera

entered.detail: brightly lit entrance framed with cyan neon lights leading to pink and purple interior
glowing pink and purple illumination visible inside the doorway ahead

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a brightly lit cyan neon doorway on the right. The SOFTSYS sign recedes into the distance as the camera moves toward the glowing entrance, where pink and purple interior lighting becomes visible. A pedestrian enters the doorway just ahead of the camera's approach.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a dim concrete underpass that gradually transforms into a vibrant, neon-lit commercial corridor. It begins in a narrow walkway beneath heavy concrete beams, passing a pawn shop and vending machines amidst scattered pedestrians. As the camera moves deeper, the shop gives way to graffiti-covered walls and artificial lighting before the environment opens into a high-tech corridor illuminated by orange ceiling strips and large digital billboards for Cirrus and Softsys. The scene then shifts from concrete to paved tiles as the crowd density increases, moving past the glowing advertisements toward a brightly lit cyan doorway. Finally, the camera approaches this glowing entrance, where pink and purple interior lights become visible as a pedestrian slips inside.
